nasb.text: Abimelech chased him, and he fled before him; and many fell wounded up to the entrance of the gate.

esv.text: And Abimelech chased him, and he fled before him. And many fell wounded, up to the entrance of the gate.

cnv.text: 亞比米勒追趕迦勒，迦勒在他面前逃跑，直到城門口，有很多受傷的人仆倒。

ccb.text: 迦勒败逃，亚比米勒紧追不舍，沿途有许多人受伤倒在地上，一直到城门口。
